fpsbooster.config.enabled.tooltip: Turn all FPS Booster optimizations on or off
fpsbooster.config.cullEntities.tooltip: Skip rendering entities that are behind walls or outside your view
fpsbooster.config.cullBlockEntities.tool: Skip rendering chests, signs and similar blocks you cannot see
fpsbooster.config.cullParticles.tooltip: Skip particles spawned behind walls or off-screen
Stop animating dropped items you cannot see
fpsbooster.config.batchChunkUpdates.tool: Combine multiple block changes in the same frame into one chunk rebuild
fpsbooster.config.poolHotVectors.tooltip: Reduce garbage collection by reusing temporary math objects
